description: This pipeline processes folder paths by converting them into folder data and then creating annotations based on the path names or full paths, ultimately generating annotated folder information.

10e4330b-d669-411c-9b2c-34b9367191cd.name: import-folder-list
10e4330b-d669-411c-9b2c-34b9367191cd.description: Converts each provided path into folder data.

89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.name: path-to-annotation-simple
89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.
